goal: Research and create a complete business plan for starting a small coffee shop, including market research, competitor analysis, menu planning, pricing strategy, budget and startup costs, location requirements, marketing plan, and a 6-month launch timeline

steps.task: Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify target audience, market trends, and competitor landscape
steps.result: Market research reveals target audience is young professionals and students. Market trends indicate growing demand for specialty coffee and sustainable products. Competitor analysis shows 5 existing coffee shops in the area, with 2 offering similar products and 3 offering distinct experiences. Main competitors are "The Daily Grind" and "Brewed Awakening".

steps.task: Develop menu planning and pricing strategy based on market research and competitor analysis
steps.result: Result: Menu planning will focus on specialty coffee drinks and sustainable products, with a range of pour-overs, lattes, and teas. Pricing strategy will be competitive with existing coffee shops in the area, with prices ranging from $2 to $5 for coffee and tea drinks, and $5 to $10 for specialty drinks and food items. A loyalty program and discounts for students and frequent customers will be offered to attract and retain customers.

steps.task: Create budget and estimate startup costs, including location requirements and equipment needs
Design marketing plan and launch timeline, including promotional activities and performance metrics
Refine business plan and create 6-month launch timeline with key milestones and deadlines
Finalize financial projections and secure funding or investment for the coffee shop
